_doc: Coverage sectional — Operations & Data Sufficiency. Original rows for official RRB NTPC syllabus coverage.

questions.stem_en: If A # B means A x B + 3, find 4 # 5.
questions.stem_hi: यदि A # B का अर्थ A x B + 3 है, तो 4 # 5 ज्ञात कीजिए।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Added A and B first: 4+5+3; # requires multiplication before adding 3.
options.trap_reason_hi: A और B add कर दिए: 4+5+3; # में पहले multiplication फिर 3 add होता है।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Added 3 to B before multiplication: 4 x (5+3).
options.trap_reason_hi: 3 को B में add करके multiplication किया: 4 x (5+3)।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Subtracted 3 after multiplication instead of adding it.
options.trap_reason_hi: Multiplication के बाद 3 add करने की जगह subtract कर दिया।

questions.explanation_concept_en: For coded mathematical operations, replace the symbol with its defined operation exactly and follow the stated order. Final answer is 23.
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Coded mathematical operations में symbol को exact defined operation से replace करें और stated order follow करें। Final answer 23 है।

questions.stem_en: Data Sufficiency: Find y. Statement I: x + y = 12. Statement II: x = 8.
questions.stem_hi: Data Sufficiency: y ज्ञात करें। Statement I: x + y = 12. Statement II: x = 8.

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Statement I gives only x+y=12; y cannot be fixed without x.
options.trap_reason_hi: Statement I सिर्फ x+y=12 देता है; x के बिना y fixed नहीं होता।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Statement II gives x=8 but says nothing about y by itself.
options.trap_reason_hi: Statement II x=8 देता है पर y के बारे में अकेले कुछ नहीं बताता।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Missed that combining x+y=12 with x=8 gives y=4.
options.trap_reason_hi: यह miss किया कि x+y=12 और x=8 combine करने पर y=4 मिलता है।

questions.explanation_method_en: Together: y = 12 - 8 = 4. Therefore, answer = Both statements together are sufficient.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Data sufficiency asks whether the data can uniquely answer the question, not whether the final answer is immediately written in one statement. Final answer is Both statements together are sufficient.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Together: y = 12 - 8 = 4। अतः answer = Both statements together are sufficient।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Data sufficiency में पूछा जाता है कि data uniquely answer दे सकता है या नहीं, final answer statement में directly लिखा है या नहीं। Final answer Both statements together are sufficient है।
